NOTICE OF ENTRY OF ORDER/NOTICE OF RULING FILED APPROVING STIPULATION AND ORDER RE: CONSENT JUDGMENT AND JUDGMENT PER TERMS OF STIPULATION AND ORDER RE: CONSENT JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELD PHD, ANTHONY E. ,P.E.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF HELD PHD, ANTHONY E. ,P.E. SERVED MAY-22-2009, CERTIFIED OR REGISTERED MAIL - OUT OF STATE AS TO DEFENDANT SWIBCO, INC.
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT SWIBCO, INC.

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD MOTION TO APPROVE PROP 65 SETTLEMENT CONTINUED FROM SEP-18-2009 TO LAW AND MOTION AT OCT-16-2009, 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302. ARGUED AND THE COURT VACATED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AND CONTINUED THE HEARING TO OCTOBER 16, 2009. PLAINTIFF'S COUNSEL TO LODGE BILLING RECORDS DIRECTLY TO DEPT. 302, WITH COVER LETTER. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD MOTION TO APPROVE PROPOSITION 65 SETTLEMENT. NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: MOTION GRANTED. ALTHOUGH THE COURT DOES NOT APPROVE THE ATTORNEY BILLING RATE OF $750.00 PER HOUR, UNDER A LESS EXACTING REVIEW STANDARD PURSUANT TO THE STIPULATION, THE COURT APPROVES THE NEGOTIATED ATTORNEY FEES AND COSTS AMOUNT. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797
THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF DEC-08-2009 IS OFF CALENDAR, JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-24-2009 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-08-2009 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-08-09 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement; Stipulation
Off Calendar Oct-16-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted. Although the court does not approve the attorney billing rate of $750.00 per hour, under a less exacting review standard pursuant to the stipulation, the court approves the negotiated attorney fees and costs amount. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797

Notice Of Motion To Approve Prop 65 Settlement; Stipulation
Off Calendar Sep-18-2009 Continued To Oct-16-09 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF ANTHONY HELD Motion to Approve Prop 65 Settlement. Appearances: David Levine, Esq. of Hirst and Chandler LLP (510) 848-8880 appearing for Plaintiff and moving party; Catherine A. Allen, Esq. of Hunton & Williams (213) 532-2000 appearing for Defendant Swabco and opposing party. Argued and the Court vacated its tentative ruling and continued the hearing to October 16, 2009. Plaintiff's counsel to lodge billing records directly to Dept. 302, with cover letter. (302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR 5797
